name: Pro Medicus Limited
analysis: PME has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 51% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$164.5500, stop A$127.9872, target A$194.3136 (0.81:1) — then trail it.
